001package net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.model.item.BoxItem;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.Unmodifiable;
006
007import java.util.Collection;
008import java.util.UUID;
009
010/**
011 * An interface that holds stock.
012 * <p>
013 * The implementation of this interface must be thread-safe.
014 */
015public interface StockHolder {
016
017    /**
018     * Gets the name of this holder.
019     *
020     * @return the name of this holder
021     */
022    @NotNull String getName();
023
024    /**
025     * Gets the uuid of this holder.
026     *
027     * @return the uuid of this holder
028     */
029    @NotNull UUID getUUID();
030
031    /**
032     * Gets the stock quantity of the specified item.
033     *
034     * @param item the item to get the stock
035     * @return the current stock quantity
036     */
037    int getAmount(@NotNull BoxItem item);
038
039    /**
040     * Sets the stock quantity of the specified item.
041     *
042     * @param item   the item to set the stock quantity
043     * @param amount the amount
044     */
045    void setAmount(@NotNull BoxItem item, int amount);
046
047    /**
048     * Increases the stock of the specified item by one.
049     *
050     * @param item the item to increase the stock
051     * @return the stock quantity after increasing
052     */
053    int increase(@NotNull BoxItem item);
054
055    /**
056     * Increases the stock of the specified item.
057     *
058     * @param item      the item to increase the stock
059     * @param increment the amount to increase the stock
060     * @return the stock quantity after increasing
061     */
062    int increase(@NotNull BoxItem item, int increment);
063
064    /**
065     * Decreases the stock of the specified item by one.
066     *
067     * @param item the item to decrease the stock
068     * @return the stock quantity after decreasing
069     */
070    int decrease(@NotNull BoxItem item);
071
072    /**
073     * Decreases the stock of the specified item.
074     *
075     * @param item      the item to decrease the stock
076     * @param decrement the amount to decrease the stock
077     * @return the stock quantity after decreasing
078     */
079    int decrease(@NotNull BoxItem item, int decrement);
080
081    /**
082     * Gets a stocked item collection.
083     *
084     * @return a stocked item collection.
085     */
086    @NotNull @Unmodifiable Collection<BoxItem> getStockedItems();
087
088    /**
089     * Gets the current stock as a {@link StockData} collection.
090     *
091     * @return the collection of {@link StockData}
092     */
093    @NotNull @Unmodifiable Collection<StockData> toStockDataCollection();
094
095}
